name: rpi5-archlinux-builder
onCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y arch-install-scripts aria2 dosfstools e2fsprogs pacman-package-manager parted psmisc systemd udev util-linux mtools qemu-system-aarch64 qemu-user-static shellcheck xz-utils python3-yaml && cp build.conf.example build.conf

tasks.label: test: run all
tasks.command: for t in tests/*.sh; do bash $t >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo PASS: $t || echo FAIL: $t; done

tasks.label: qemu: full cycle
tasks.command: cp build.conf.example build.conf && ./scripts/package.sh && rm -f dist/images/archlinux-qemu-aarch64.img && ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image build-qemu 2>&1 | tee build-qemu.log && sudo pkill -f qemu-system 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image qemu-run 2>&1 | tee qemu-boot.log &
